overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic coastal city at sunset. The character descends a wide concrete ramp, crosses an open plaza, and walks along a commercial street toward an underpass, with amusement park structures visible in the distance against a golden-orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide concrete pedestrian ramp descending to street level

events.description: begins descending the steep concrete ramp from elevated position

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide concrete ramp toward the city street below, with palm trees lining the right side

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with yellow trim and smoke rising from the roof
large ferris wheel silhouette visible against the sunset sky
wide sloping concrete walkway with yellow tactile paving strips
tall palm trees scattered along the right side of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high vantage point descending a wide concrete ramp. A massive brutalist commercial building dominates the right side while a ferris wheel and amusement park structures are visible in the distant left against a golden sunset. The camera follows the character walking down the slope with palm trees lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection plaza with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: reaches flat ground at bottom of ramp entering open plaza intersection area
turns right onto sidewalk alongside the commercial building

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead across the plaza toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing signals
elevated roadway bridge spanning across the street ahead
futuristic curved street lighting poles with dual arms

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the bottom of the ramp and enters a wide open plaza intersection. Traffic signals and modern street lamps become visible as the character crosses the open area and turns right onto the sidewalk. The commercial building looms closer on the right while the amusement park structures remain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: building casts shadow reducing direct sunlight as the sun sets lower

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the commercial building with glowing neon advertisements and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the underpass

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements on the building facade
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge near the curb
rectangular concrete planter with green vegetation

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the character passes beneath glowing neon advertising screens on the building facade. The lighting shifts as the building casts shadows, and the underpass bridge ahead grows larger in the frame. Street furniture like fire hydrants and planters line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass beneath elevated roadway

events.description: entering the shaded underpass beneath the elevated highway
ambient light drops significantly as entering deep shadow of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the underpass tunnel beneath the roadway, moving toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: concrete tunnel structure with roadway overhead and lights visible at the far end
green and yellow neon strip lights under the building overhang illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the underpass beneath the elevated highway. The environment becomes significantly darker as the overhead structure blocks the sunset, with only neon strip lights and distant tunnel lights providing illumination. The commercial building and palm trees fall behind as the character moves into the sheltered concrete passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high, sun-drenched vantage point down into the shadowed depths of a city underpass. It begins by descending a wide concrete ramp beside a massive brutalist building, with palm trees lining the path and a distant ferris wheel silhouetted against a golden sunset. As the character reaches the bottom, the scene opens into a wide plaza intersection filled with traffic signals and street lamps before turning right onto a commercial sidewalk. The lighting then shifts from bright gold to deep shadow as the camera passes beneath glowing neon advertising screens and street furniture, with the overhead bridge growing larger in the frame. Finally, the environment darkens significantly as the character enters the concrete underpass, leaving the sunset and palm trees behind in favor of artificial neon strip lights.
